the-human-inversion:
When capable AI absorbs most artifact production between foundation and review, human leverage shifts to those two ends.

Coherence, hiring, attention, and durable write integrity still matter—but they have to be earned differently than when the calendar’s middle absorbed most of the cross-disciplinary translation work.

This series traces that inversion: why it is economically forced, what breaks when the old execution “middle” stops carrying translation, and how teams can staff foundation and review without defaulting back to meeting-heavy coordination.
